# Copilot Instructions — Thread Context Server

Always load and follow the **thread-auto-context** skill (`.github/skills/thread-auto-context/SKILL.md`).
Use Thread MCP tools proactively — never wait for the user to ask.

To use this skill in other projects, copy `.github/skills/thread-auto-context/` and `.vscode/mcp.example.json` to their project root, then rename `mcp.example.json` → `mcp.json` and fill in your paths.
